name: Chaithanya Kumar Gogula
title: Senior VMware Administrator | Cloud & Virtualization Specialist
about: Senior VMware & Cloud Engineer with 9+ years of experience in enterprise virtualization, OCI cloud, OLVM/KVM environments, and datacenter operations. Expert in designing scalable infrastructure, leading migration projects, and implementing automation to improve performance, availability, and operational efficiency.

automation.name: ESXi Patch Reporting
automation.description: Developed PowerCLI scripts to generate automated ESXi patch compliance reports across clusters, improving audit readiness and visibility.

automation.name: Inventory Collection
automation.description: Built automation scripts to extract VM, host, datastore, and cluster inventory data for large-scale environments.

automation.name: Health Checks
automation.description: Implemented automated health checks for ESXi hosts, vCenter, and VMs, reducing manual monitoring effort.

automation.name: Citrix Migration Tool
automation.description: Created automation workflows to assist in Citrix workload migrations with minimal downtime.

automation.name: RAM Expansion Tool
automation.description: Developed scripts to perform bulk VM memory expansion with validation and logging.

automation.name: Hardware Version Tool
automation.description: Automated VM hardware upgrades across clusters, ensuring compatibility and compliance.

automation.name: KeePass Retrieval Tool
automation.description: Implemented secure credential retrieval automation integrated with KeePass for infrastructure scripts.

points: Manage and maintain enterprise-scale infrastructure with over 50,000 virtual machines and 6000+ ESXi hosts across multiple global data centers.
Designed and implemented VMware vSphere clusters with HA and DRS policies, achieving 99.99% uptime for critical healthcare workloads.
Led OCI VM deployment and lifecycle management including provisioning, scaling, monitoring, and troubleshooting.
Administer OLVM (KVM) environments including VM provisioning, resource allocation, and performance tuning.
Executed large-scale migration projects including VMware to cloud, Citrix migrations, and cross-platform workload transitions.
Automated VM provisioning, patching, and infrastructure tasks using PowerCLI, reducing deployment time by over 40%.
Managed vSAN storage environments, LUN provisioning, and storage optimization for high performance.
Collaborated with network and security teams integrating F5 load balancers and enterprise hardware environments.
Worked closely with VMware support teams on critical ESXi failures, reducing MTTR by 30%.
Implemented proactive monitoring and alerting strategies to ensure high availability and system reliability.

experience.company: Lowe’s Services India Pvt Ltd & KPMG Global Services
points: Executed end-to-end VMware patching and upgrade activities using VMware Update Manager ensuring compliance with security standards.
Supported VMware environments across versions 6.x and 7.x, enabling seamless upgrades and migrations.
Performed P2V and V2V migrations for legacy systems, improving infrastructure efficiency and scalability.
Automated Windows server patching and deployments using SCCM and Shavlik, reducing manual effort by 50%.
Implemented live migrations using vMotion and Storage vMotion to ensure zero downtime maintenance.
Enhanced monitoring and alerting using SolarWinds and vRealize Operations (vRops).
Performed root cause analysis on infrastructure issues, reducing recurring incidents.
Collaborated with networking teams for VLAN, router, and switch troubleshooting.
Managed Windows patching operations for over 20,000 enterprise endpoints ensuring near 100% compliance.
Administered Windows Server environments including 2003, 2008, and 2012 R2 platforms.
Handled complete VM lifecycle management including provisioning, patching, monitoring, and decommissioning.
Improved monitoring systems using Nagios and Tivoli for proactive issue detection.
Supported VMware vCenter upgrades and ESXi maintenance activities.
Collaborated with infrastructure teams for performance tuning and system optimization.
Worked in NOC/OC environment monitoring VMware, Windows, and application systems across global clients.
Provided Tier-1 and Tier-2 support for VMware and Windows-related issues.
Created daily performance and availability reports using monitoring tools like Tivoli and vRops.
Handled incident management and escalations with proper documentation and RCA.
Improved response times and service availability through proactive monitoring.
